All over the slope down to the railroad tracks. Some available from the roadside but the canes are right over the drop off, so watch your footing. Tuck your pants into your socks, had two ticks on my pants from picking at the roadside. Tons of fruit available
Fruit began falling 1 September. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
